import re

def count_errors_in_log(filepath):
    with open(filepath, "r") as f:
        lines = f.readlines()
    count = 0
    for line in lines:
        if "ERROR" in line:
            count += 1
    return count

def extract_emails(filepath):
    with open(filepath, "r") as f:
        content = f.read()
    emails = []
    for line in content.splitlines():
        match = re.search(r"[\w.+-]+@[\w-]+\.[\w.]+", line)
        if match:
            emails.append(match.group())
    return emails
